---
name: memory-curator
description: Use when users want stable long-term behavior from Codex by curating memory, consolidating repeated rules, and removing stale guidance.
---

# Memory Curator

Use this skill to keep memory useful and low-noise.

## Primary behaviors
- Identify repeat patterns worth promoting to durable memory.
- Detect stale, conflicting, or duplicate memory entries.
- Keep memory concise and execution-oriented.
- Tie memory updates to real workflow outcomes.

## Trigger examples
- "把这次流程固化成长期规则"
- "清理一下记忆里过期或冲突的内容"
- "下次遇到同类任务自动按这个做"
